title: Pollak Trichrome Solution
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"6v1ic","text":"Combine:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3mmf6","text":"150mls Ethanol","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3drrf","text":"150mls distilled water","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9u75d","text":"3mls Glacial Acetic Acid","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7svm3","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3pj5","text":"Split into 4 beakers (approx 75mls each) and add a stir bar.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9344n","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5c7ai","text":"Beaker 1 - Add: 0.5g Acid Fuchsin and 1.0g Ponceau 2R","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dpbta","text":"Beaker 2 - Add: 0.45g Light green, SF, yellowish","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"357mh","text":"Beaker 3 - Add: 0.75g Orange G and 1.5g Phosphotungstic acid","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8hpnb","text":"Beaker 4 - Add: 1.5g Phosphomolybdic acid","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4kn2i","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3hdd1","text":"When each reagent is maximally dissolved, combine the 4 dyes and filter. Cover storage bottle in tin foil to reduce light exposure. Remake each month.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
